description: Representative HWPX package-drift policy for the rhwp-mcp external surface comparison. This policy classifies known semantic-equivalent drift separately from visual/text/profile regressions.

cases.name: government_same_edit_hwpx
cases.label: Government HWPX same-edit output
cases.intent: The government same-edit outputs should be visually and semantically equal; raw package differences may only be lexical/XML serialization drift.

cases.name: business_same_edit_hwpx
cases.label: Business overview HWPX same-edit output
cases.intent: The compact business same-edit outputs should be visually and semantically equal; raw package drift is limited to line-segment preservation.

cases.name: foreign_investment_same_edit_hwpx
cases.label: Foreign-investment HWPX same-edit output
cases.intent: The long-form foreign-investment same-edit outputs should preserve pages, target-page pixels, geometry, text/profile/style signatures, and only expose run-count package drift.
